title: Yuuzhan Vong fleet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
{{MultipleIssues|citation|moresources}}
[[File:SWINV-1-PG-08-02.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A Yuuzhan Vong fleet]]
This '''fleet''' was the unified armada of [[Starship/Legends|ships]] and vessels of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Koros-Strohna]] in their attempted conquest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

{{Military-stub}}

==History==
The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] traveled in great [[Koros-Strohna|worldships]] to come to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. When [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] located the galaxy 50 years before the beginning of the invasion, agents had been set up to provide a flow of intelligence to the Yuuzhan Vong.

The [[Praetorite Vong]] were the first to enter the galaxy, thus beginning the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. But during the [[Battle of Helska IV]], the [[yammosk]] and almost the whole fleet were destroyed, leaving only rogue elements inside the galaxy.

When [[Shedao Shai]]'s [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] entered the galaxy, their first mission was to finish the work that the Praetorite Vong started. When [[Deign Lian]] discovered what the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] destroyed, he and Shai planned their attack on [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. But, after the death of Shedao Shai in battle, Deign Lian was also killed after trying to leave the system after destroying the ecosystem of Ithor.

After the capture of [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]], [[Priest/Legends|Priest]] [[Harrar]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Tla]] planned to fake a defection of priest [[Elan]] to kill large numbers of Jedi. To get the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to trust Elan's intelligence, they, with Commander [[Malik Carr]], planned to lose some battles, and lose many vessels in the process. But after Elan's failure and her death, [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] [[Nas Choka]] decided that Harrar and Tla could no longer be trusted and recalled them to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

[[File:ScoutingTheVong-GOI.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A New Republic [[Scout ship/Legends|scout ship]] monitoring the Yuuzhan Vong fleet]]
After being stationed in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]], Choka arrived and planned to begin the invasion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]]. After leading the New Republic to believe they were going to attack [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], Choka lead an assault on [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]]. But, during the battle, [[Centerpoint Station]] was fired and half of the Yuuzhan Vong armada at Fondor was destroyed. Nas Choka believed that the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] had betrayed them and set a course back to Hutt Space.

Steadily, the Yuuzhan Vong fleet moved toward the Core Worlds, taking [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane]] arrived on [[Yuuzhan'tar]], most of the fleet was spread out along the galaxy.

When the Yuuzhan Vong were defeated in the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], the Yuuzhan Vong fleet was sent into [[Coruscant Prime/Legends|Coruscant Prime]] as part of the [[Sekot accords|Sekot Accords]].

==Composition==
After the [[First Battle of Obroa-skai]], the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] estimated the Yuuzhan Vong naval strength to be at one thousand [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], deployed in small groups of twenty-five to seventy-vessels each consisting of analogs to [[Warship/Legends|warships]], [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]], [[Destroyer/Legends|destroyers]], [[Troop carrier/Legends|troop carriers]], [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]], [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]] and [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]], along with [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] known as [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]].
